build.beforeBuildCommand: npm run build && npm run dev:tauri-prep && npm run package:tauri-resources

security.csp: default-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' http://127.0.0.1:47899 http://localhost:47899 http://127.0.0.1:5173 http://localhost:5173 ws://127.0.0.1:5173 ws://localhost:5173; img-src 'self' data: blob: http://127.0.0.1:47899 http://localhost:47899; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self'; font-src 'self' data:; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'none'; frame-ancestors 'none'
